title: PDF Wiki
summary: Local-first knowledge base from PDFs. Drop a PDF, run ingest, get a cross-linked markdown wiki with semantic search. Two extraction paths: Anthropic API key (fast, no page limit) or Claude Code subscription (zero config, 60pp max). Claude Sonnet vision describes every figure as > [!figure] blocks. Optional PNG extraction via Poppler. Configurable via pdfwiki.config.yaml with pre-commit gate, CI, and a review-changes workflow for collaborative knowledge curation.

title: Lokalise (Translation Platform)
summary: Full-stack translation platform inspired by Lokalise — background AI translation across multiple languages, missed-key detection that flags untranslated strings, and a human verification loop for quality control. Supports manual translation workflow alongside AI suggestions.

title: Loop-me Enterprise
summary: An AI-powered interview system where a virtual interviewer runs structured conversations using Google's Gemini agents. Think of it as an automated HR assistant that conducts interviews, takes notes, and writes reports — all while keeping context across the whole conversation.

title: PII Anonymization Research
summary: Researched and benchmarked multiple AI methods for detecting and removing personal information from text. Compared LLMs, specialized NLP models, and Microsoft's Presidio framework — think of it as finding the best tool to automatically redact names, addresses, and sensitive data from documents.

title: Adaptive Retrieval
summary: Smarter RAG: the model self-checks if retrieved information is sufficient. If not, it escalates for deep research — reducing hallucinations without extra latency on easy questions.

title: Teams Transcript Processor
summary: Automated pipeline ingesting MS Teams meeting recordings via webhooks, analyzing with AI, and storing structured reports. Two-server architecture for enterprise compliance.

title: Math Tool / Pricing Agent
summary: Multi-agent playground built on the Vercel AI SDK and Bun. Four workspaces: arithmetic CLI agent, interactive code REPL, eBay pricing agent that searches live listings and computes quotes, and a web server exposing all agents over SSE with a static UI.

title: Streamr ML Trading
summary: Hackathon project: real-time data streaming + ML for crypto trading signals. Won 2nd place at LearnWeb3 AI Hackathon.

title: Book AI Chat (PDF RAG)
summary: Upload a PDF and ask questions with AI. PostgresML powers semantic search over document text.

title: CAD Pricing Tool
summary: Deterministic pricing engine for machined parts from STEP files. Reads 3D geometry via OpenCASCADE, computes machining time from volume and features, applies workshop rates, and generates an interactive HTML quote — no guessing, no hallucinations.

title: Manufacturing Route Analysis
summary: Auditable analysis tool for factory routing decisions. Parses PLC telemetry into structured datasets, scores every gate decision, detects counterfactual opportunities, and generates three standalone HTML dashboards — architecture map, scoring report, and interactive Q&A chat.

title: Crypto Trading Monitor
summary: Real-time cryptocurrency monitoring system with multi-exchange support (Binance, Kraken, KuCoin). Routes symbols to the correct exchange automatically, tracks market data, and supports autonomous execution strategies for paper trading.

title: Currency Manager
summary: Financial application for fiat and crypto transfers. Built for regulated fintech with sanction screening and compliance features.

title: Alike (Ranking Engine)
summary: Manufacturing part similarity and ranking engine inspired by Pinterest's ranking algorithms. Learns which parts, materials, and processes are related and ranks them by relevance to the query — a "you might also like" for workshop inventories and supplier catalogs.

title: Eboombox
summary: Sound visualization for Cardano blockchain (EUTXO model). Turns on-chain transactions into audio — making blockchain data explorable through sound.

title: ZKFloki Staking dApp
summary: Staking application on zkSync layer 2. Users lock tokens and earn rewards — designed and shipped with a friend in 5 days.

title: NFT Perpetual Trading
summary: Trading platform giving exposure to NFT floor prices without owning the NFTs. Full stack — frontend, backend watcher, PostgreSQL.

title: Smart Contract Collection
summary: Stablecoin, lottery, and fundraising contracts in Solidity with Foundry. Demonstrates Ethereum development and formal testing practices.

title: Cardano Token Minting
summary: Toolkit for minting tokens and NFTs on Cardano. Includes on-chain NFT reconstruction guide.

title: Table CRUD (Prisma)
summary: Full-stack user management app with Next.js and Prisma ORM. Clean UI for create, read, update, delete operations.

title: News Aggregator
summary: News feed aggregator from NewsAPI — state management with Redux Toolkit and RTK Query.

title: Printu SVG Bounding Box
summary: Interactive tool creating bounding boxes around SVG elements. Demonstrates geometric computation and canvas manipulation.

title: Custom Charts (D3)
summary: Custom graph components with Recharts and D3.js — bar charts, line charts, interactive plots for data visualization.
